Heavily laden apple (?) on the N side of 20 a bit E of the Mayflower rotary/roundabout. Couldn't stop to check it out, but looks promising. Looked like green apples, but could've even been a pear; didn't get a good look. Falling Fruit season: September-unknown

Heavily-laden apple on the E side of the street, just a bit N of Keller. Spotted it from the car on the other side of the road, so couldn't stop but looks worth a look! Falling Fruit season: September-October.

Tasted 8/17/13 and though it looked ripe, didn't TASTE ripe. Perhaps these are actually red delicious or something and need a few more weeks of sunshine (crossed fingers) to get tasty? Falling Fruit season: September-September.
